items.title: Verstappen to compete in 'bucket list' 24-hour race
items.description: Four-time Formula 1 world champion Max Verstappen will tick off one of his "bucket list" events when he drives in May's Nurburgring 24-Hours endurance race.

items.title: 'Greener Bantams' leading tree-planting scheme with one for every goal scored
items.description: Bradford City plant 154 trees - one for each goal scored by its men's and women's teams last season - at its training ground as part of its commitment to sustainability.

items.title: Bhatia chases down Berger, wins API in playoff
items.description: Akshay Bhatia outlasted Daniel Berger with a par on the first playoff hole to win the Arnold Palmer Invitational on Sunday.

items.title: AC Milan vant byderbyet
